{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "elec.medium_voltage_kv",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 11,
      "unit": "kV",
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "The campus electrical distribution system shall be designed for a nominal medium voltage of 11 kV, 3-phase, 50 Hz from the utility incoming feed and standby generator plant."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "elec.medium_voltage_frequency_hz",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 50,
      "unit": "Hz",
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "The campus electrical distribution system shall be designed for a nominal medium voltage of 11 kV, 3-phase, 50 Hz from the utility incoming feed and standby generator plant."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "elec.medium_voltage_phase",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "3-phase",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "The campus electrical distribution system shall be designed for a nominal medium voltage of 11 kV, 3-phase, 50 Hz from the utility incoming feed and standby generator plant."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "elec.secondary_voltage_v",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 415,
      "unit": "V",
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Secondary distribution shall be at 415 V, 3-phase, 4-wire plus ground, 50 Hz."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "elec.secondary_voltage_frequency_hz",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 50,
      "unit": "Hz",
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Secondary distribution shall be at 415 V, 3-phase, 4-wire plus ground, 50 Hz."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "elec.secondary_voltage_phase",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "3-phase",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Secondary distribution shall be at 415 V, 3-phase, 4-wire plus ground, 50 Hz."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "elec.secondary_wiring",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "4-wire plus ground",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Secondary distribution shall be at 415 V, 3-phase, 4-wire plus ground, 50 Hz."
    }
  ]
}
